message:
feat(sentry): add org/project slug config and doctor provisioning checks

Extend Sentry connector configuration to accept optional org_slug and
project_slug parameters, enabling scoped API operations.

- configure() now returns structured status and detail metadata
  including auth mode and slug context.
- doctor() gains three new provisioning checks: auth_validation (via
  list_projects read-only probe), project_validation (verifies slug
  exists in org), and network_constraints (enforces HTTPS policy on
  base URL, exempting localhost for tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
